ar.notice.cookie.title: إفصاح الكوكيز
ar.notice.cookie.body: يستخدم هذا الموقع الكوكيز فقط للوظائف الضرورية للغاية ويتجنب كوكيز التتبع بأي ثمن.

en_GB.notice.cookie.title: Cookie Disclosure
en_GB.notice.cookie.body: This website only uses cookies for absolutely necessary functionality and avoids tracking cookies at all costs.

en_US.notice.cookie.body: This website only uses cookies for absolutely necessary functionality and avoids tracking cookies at all costs.

ro_RO.notice.cookie.title: Notificare Cookies
ro_RO.notice.cookie.body: Acest website folosește cookies doar pentru funcționalitate strict necesară și evită cookies de tracking pe cât posibil.
